17.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
17.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

17.gl: properly, something round (as excavated or bored), i.e. a chafing-dish forcoals or a caldron forcooking; hence (from similarity of form) a washbowl; also (for the same reason) a pulpit or platform
17.dv: or כִּיֹּר; from the same as H3564 (כּוּר);

18.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
18.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
18.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

18.gl: to revolve, surround, or border; used in various applications, literally and figuratively
18.kj: bring, cast, fetch, lead, make, walk, [idiom] whirl, [idiom] round about, be about on every side, apply, avoid, beset (about), besiege, bring again, carry (about), change, cause to

18.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
18.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

18.gl: an entrance (the place or the act); specifically sunset or the west; also (adverb with preposition) towards
18.kj: by which came, as cometh, in coming, as men enter into, entering, entrance into, entry, where goeth, going down, [phrase] westward. Compare H4126 (מוֹבָא).

18.gl: Ashshur, the second son of Shem; also his descendants and the country occupied by them (i.e. Assyria), its region and its empire
18.kj: Asshur, Assur, Assyria, Assyrians. See H838 (אָשֻׁר).
18.dv: or אַשֻּׁר; apparently from H833 (אָשַׁר) (in the sense of successful);

18.gl: properly, the (outer) wall side; hence, exterior; figuratively, secular (as opposed to sacred)

19.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
19.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph

19.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
19.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

19.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
19.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
19.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

19.gl: properly, an overhanging, i.e. (by implication) an excess, superiority, remainder; also a small rope (as hanging free)
19.kj: [phrase] abundant, cord, exceeding, excellancy(-ent), what they leave, that hath left, plentifully, remnant, residue, rest, string, with.

19.gl: properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book
19.kj: bill, book, evidence, [idiom] learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll.

19.gl: to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe)

20.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
20.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

20.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
20.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

20.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
20.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

20.gl: to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel
20.kj: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

20.gl: Chizkijah, a king of Judah, also the name of two other Israelites
20.dv: or חִזְקִיָּהוּ; also יְחִזְקִיָּה; or יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ; from H2388 (חָזַק) and H3050 (יָהּ); strengthened of Jah;

20.gl: to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose)
20.kj: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.
